mapper.select:
SELECT LECCODE, LEARNING_CD, CATEGORY_CD, CATEGORY_NAME, SUBJECT_TEACHER, SUBJECT_TEACHER_NAME, SUBJECT_NM, SUBJECT_TITLE, CHOICE_POINT, USER_ID FROM (SELECT A.LECCODE, A.LEARNING_CD, A.CATEGORY_CD, B.NAME AS CATEGORY_NAME, A.SUBJECT_TEACHER, (SELECT USER_NM FROM TB_MA_MEMBER WHERE ISUSE = 'Y' AND USER_ID = A.SUBJECT_TEACHER) AS SUBJECT_TEACHER_NAME, A.SUBJECT_TITLE, C.SUBJECT_NM, D.CHOICE_POINT, D.USER_ID FROM TB_LEC_MST A INNER JOIN TB_CATEGORY_INFO B ON A.CATEGORY_CD = B.CODE INNER JOIN TB_SUBJECT_INFO C ON A.SUBJECT_SJT_CD = C.SUBJECT_CD INNER JOIN ( SELECT SEQ, LECCODE, USER_ID, CHOICE_POINT, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY LECCODE, USER_ID ORDER BY LECCODE, USER_ID, CHOICE_POINT DESC, SEQ DESC) AS RNK FROM TB_COMMENT ) D ON A.LECCODE = D.LECCODE AND D.RNK = 1 WHERE A.LEC_TYPE_CHOICE = 'D' ORDER BY A.REG_DT DESC ) AA WHERE 1 = 1
AND CATEGORY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%')
AND SUBJECT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%')
AND SUBJECT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%')
AND SUBJECT_TEACHER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%')
AND ( CATEGORY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%') OR SUBJECT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%') OR SUBJECT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%') OR SUBJECT_TEACHER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%') )
LIMIT #{pageRow} OFFSET #{startNo}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM (SELECT A.LECCODE, A.LEARNING_CD, A.CATEGORY_CD, B.NAME AS CATEGORY_NAME, A.SUBJECT_TEACHER, (SELECT USER_NM FROM TB_MA_MEMBER WHERE ISUSE = 'Y' AND USER_ID = A.SUBJECT_TEACHER) AS SUBJECT_TEACHER_NAME, A.SUBJECT_TITLE, C.SUBJECT_NM, D.CHOICE_POINT, D.USER_ID FROM TB_LEC_MST A INNER JOIN TB_CATEGORY_INFO B ON A.CATEGORY_CD = B.CODE INNER JOIN TB_SUBJECT_INFO C ON A.SUBJECT_SJT_CD = C.SUBJECT_CD INNER JOIN ( SELECT SEQ, LECCODE, USER_ID, CHOICE_POINT, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY LECCODE, USER_ID ORDER BY LECCODE, USER_ID, CHOICE_POINT DESC, SEQ DESC) AS RNK FROM TB_COMMENT ) D ON A.LECCODE = D.LECCODE AND D.RNK = 1 WHERE A.LEC_TYPE_CHOICE = 'D' ) AA WHERE 1 = 1
AND CATEGORY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%')
AND SUBJECT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%')
AND SUBJECT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%')
AND SUBJECT_TEACHER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%')
AND ( CATEGORY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%') OR SUBJECT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%') OR SUBJECT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%') OR SUBJECT_TEACHER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{SEARCHKEYWORD}, '%') )

SELECT A.LECCODE, A.LEARNING_CD, A.CATEGORY_CD, (SELECT NAME FROM TB_CATEGORY_INFO WHERE CODE = A.CATEGORY_CD) AS CATEGORY_NAME, A.SUBJECT_TEACHER, (SELECT USER_NM FROM TB_MA_MEMBER WHERE ISUSE = 'Y' AND USER_ID = A.SUBJECT_TEACHER) AS SUBJECT_TEACHER_NAME, (SELECT SUBJECT_NM FROM TB_SUBJECT_INFO WHERE ISUSE = 'Y' AND SUBJECT_CD = A.SUBJECT_SJT_CD) AS SJT_NM, A.SUBJECT_TITLE FROM TB_LEC_MST A WHERE LECCODE = #{DETAIL_LECCODE}

SELECT LECCODE, SEQ, USER_ID, USER_NAME, CONTENT, CHOICE_POINT, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT FROM TB_COMMENT WHERE LECCODE = #{DETAIL_LECCODE} ORDER BY SEQ DESC LIMIT #{pageRow} OFFSET #{startNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_COMMENT WHERE LECCODE = #{LECCODE} AND SEQ = #{SEQ}
